programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Come Hell or High Winds
programme.desc: Stop me if you heard this one before? What's fast, windy, and can ruin your day in seconds? Of course, we're talking about the weather. And over the next half hour, we'll be bringing you some of the craziest moments ever captured on camera; from hailstorms to tornados and everything in between, we're going to show it all, right here on Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Raindrops Keep Falling On My Head
programme.desc: Buckle up, folks, because we're headed straight into the eye of the hurricane, the mouth of the volcano, and the depths of the flood, and we're doing it all right here, on another episode of Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Let It Snow, Let It Snow, Let It Snow
programme.desc: Today's forecast is a doozy! Wind, followed by hail, and then with a bit of a hurricane for good measure.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Right As Rainstorms
programme.desc: The wind whips and rain is pours, but you're not in the elements- you're watching Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Flashflood Gates Are Open!
programme.desc: Weather has always been here, from long before arrived, and it will stick around long after we are gone. This unstoppable force has both enhanced and ruined people's days since the dawn of time...but it also creates some incredible situations. Lucky for you, we've captured some of the best for you to see. Strap in and prepare yourself, because it's time once again for Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.desc: Laura’s search for farm heroes leads her to White Cloud, Kansas to meet with Ray Archuleta who is inspiring an entire generation of agricultural trailblazers. In order to prove how vital soil health is to farming, Ray and Laura get their hands dirty in the fields to collect samples. With three samples in tow, its back to the lab they go to try out Ray’s rain simulator. How will the farm samples stack up? Let’s find out.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: With the mission complete, the contestants think the season is winding down—but HQ has other plans. Their once-fabricated cover story becomes reality, pulling them into a pulse-pounding new challenge designed to test strength, coordination, and mastery of weaponry. This hybrid competition pushes every skill to the limit, weeding out all but the most well-rounded tactical athletes. Along the way, the legendary Don Mann shares his own backstory, giving rare insight into the life and mindset of the man behind the mission. When the dust settles, only one competitor will rise above the rest—earning the title of the season’s most complete warrior.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The competition reaches its ultimate test as the Face-Off enters Phase Two. Contestants are pushed to their breaking points with a brutal mix of tactical and physical challenges—running and gunning through the forest, navigating five tactical evolutions, and grinding through five grueling physical trials, capped by a punishing two-mile run over unforgiving terrain. Along the way, Don reveals the origins of his legendary SEAL Adventure Challenge, the inspiration behind this ultimate proving ground. When one contestant’s body shuts down in shock, the resilience of the warrior mindset is put on full display in a dramatic fight to recover and press on. In this season finale, only the strongest will endure, but every competitor leaves forged by fire.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: This episode of Boom America dives headfirst into the businesses modernizing America’s energy and infrastructure landscape. The A-Team kicks things off with Switch It Up, breaking down how smart energy upgrades - like high-efficiency lighting, EV charging, and electrical modernization - are helping companies cut costs and stay competitive. Next, the focus shifts to Raida Tech, where the team highlights a company operating years ahead of the market but in need of sharper messaging to fully unlock its potential. From there, Tangible Assets, LLC takes center stage as the experts help refine its positioning, credibility, and growth strategy in a crowded investment space. Finally, New Home National Title gets a no-nonsense diagnostic as the team maps out a clear path to scale, increase visibility, and claim its place as a national contender. From practical innovation to bold business strategy, this episode proves that the future of American enterprise is powered by smart decisions and even smarter execution.

programme.title: S1E3 Lucha
programme.desc: Ian Hodgkinson, known as Vampiro in the world of wrestling, was a famed wrestler in the late 80’s and 90’s. Today, he shifted his career to being behind the scenes as a Story Producer for AAA, the top wrestling company in Lucha Libre. Hodgkinson intimately peels back the curtain on the mysteries of this show, how it’s produced, and what life is like on and off the stage. We dive deep in to the lives of two wrestlers and follow their stories as they prep for their next fight: El Hijo Del Fantasma, an up and coming star who seemingly has it all, as well as Faby Apache, a veteran female wrestler struggling to stay relevant as she raises her son.

programme.title: Law of the Lash
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal sets out to capture a notorious outlaw gang, confronting corruption and danger as he fights to bring justice to the frontier

programme.title: Judge Roy Bean — Season 1, Episode 29: “Bad Medicine
programme.desc: Judge Roy Bean dispenses his unique brand of frontier justice when a suspicious illness spreads through the town, raising fears of foul play. As tensions rise and accusations mount, Bean must uncover the truth behind the so-called “bad medicine” while keeping order in his rough-and-tumble courtroom.

programme.title: Spook Town (1944)
programme.desc: A government agent travels to a remote town rumored to be haunted, where a series of mysterious events are being used to frighten residents away from valuable land. As he investigates, he uncovers a scheme by outlaws exploiting superstition to carry out their plans, and works to expose the truth and restore order.

programme.title: Law of the 45's
programme.desc: A determined lawman takes on a gang of outlaws terrorizing the frontier, using his skill with a .45 to restore order and protect innocent settlers.

programme.title: Fugitive Valley (1941)
programme.desc: The Range Busters pursue a group of outlaws hiding in a remote valley, uncovering a scheme of robbery and murder as they work to track down the fugitives and bring them to justice.

programme.title: Dead Aim
programme.desc: A traveling gravedigger during an (unspecified) war adopts a orphan he finds alone in the desert. After the war with the orphan grown and business slow, the orphan begins to generate business himself by shooting people.

programme.title: Blue Steel
programme.desc: U.S. marshal John Carruthers observes a robbery and Sheriff Jake thinks he may be the culprit. Meanwhile the town's leading citizen is planning to rob everybody blind.

programme.title: Four of the Apocalypse 1975
programme.desc: In Four of the Apocalypse, director Lucio Fulci delivers a gritty and haunting Spaghetti Western. After a crooked sheriff banishes four misfits—a gambler, a prostitute, a drunk, and a simple-minded man—they journey across a lawless frontier searching for survival and redemption. But their path collides with a sadistic bandit, plunging them into violence, cruelty, and despair. Blending raw brutality with moments of tenderness, this bleak tale explores the struggle for humanity in a world gone savage.

programme.title: Bells Of Rosarita
programme.desc: Sue Farnum inherits a circus, but her dead father's partner is trying to take it away from her. Roy and Bob Nolan are filming a movie on location at the circus. They and a number of other western movie stars come to Sue's aid, putting on a show and catching the bad guys.

programme.title: Man From Music Mountain
programme.desc: When nasty land developers try to bilk honest ranchers who don't know their land holds lots of gold, Gene puts a stop to it.

programme.title: Heroes On Call: The Forgotten Story of America's First Paramedics
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Americans were dying at shocking rates due to inadequate emergency care. Enter Freedom House Ambulance Service: the first paramedics unit in the U.S., run and staffed by Black men and women. This is the origin story of EMS.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy: The Killings That Shook a College Community
programme.desc: A young boy and his family's housekeeper are brutally killed in an upscale Omaha neighborhood. Their case goes cold for years, until another double homicide reveals the link and unmasks a serial killer.

programme.title: Ballin' in Baltimore: Chic DJ Tiara LaNiece Schools Angel in Charm City Street Style
programme.desc: Angel suits up with Radio DJ and fashionista Tiara LaNiece. They grab one-of-a-kind threads you can only find in Charm City, dance with the city's best hip hop crew, stop for some sweet treats and create an incredible graffiti mural.

programme.title: Blind Kitchen: Re-creating Monkfish in the Garden vs. Tasty Triangles
